steps.t: Cúthing is standing near Meregyth, outside the Mead Hall of Beaconwatch. Meregyth asked you to speak with Cúthing and learn what he has planned.
The cave-entrances lie to the west of Beaconwatch. Cúthing asked you to collapse the entrances of the Orcs' caves.
Cúthing is standing near Meregyth, outside the Mead Hall of Beaconwatch. You should return to Beaconwatch and let Cúthing know about your success.
